parameters-en.Position: Adjusts the position or frequency of the wah effect. By default, this is assigned to Expression Pedal 1. Set Min and Max below to restrict the wah's frequency sweep range.
parameters-en.Q Trim: Controls the Q or bandwidth of the effect. Lower values boost a wider frequency band and higher values boost a narrower frequency band.
parameters-en.Vol Trim: Emulates the actual pedal's side volume trim knob.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the wah effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no wah effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard. If the wah effect is a bit strong, consider bringing this down a bit.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the Wah block.
